name: creditgate-authority
description: OpenClaw-compatible authority module that scores signed 0G agent history before allowing spend.

tools.name: inspect_agent_credit
tools.description: Verify an agent's signed history and return its score, cap, and evidence root.

tools.name: request_authority
tools.description: Ask the gate to approve or refuse a spend request against the active mandate cap.

tools.name: record_gate_receipt
tools.description: Return the refusal or allowed-use root that should be anchored on 0G Chain.

runtime.publicBoundary: CreditGate only receives signed public side effects and mandate requests.
